[...] ... [...]

[...] x LU ZI.GA BAD ⸢LA?⸣ [...]

[...] ... a loss ... [...]

[...] that house ... [...]

[...] ana KUR₂ BAD.BAD-šu ina UN? [...]

[...] as for the enemy, his defeat, amongst the people [...]
